description: Pure-SAMBA LP baseline: grid-tied PV + battery, 9500 kWh/yr generic load (July peak), two-season TOU buy tariff, monthly sell rates, 2%/yr grid escalation, year=2023.
notes: Internally-consistent LP-optimal regression baseline for the SAMBA NPC formulation (full present-value cashflows: bought - sold + service over the project lifetime).
The LP installs the minimum PV needed to satisfy the renewable-fraction constraint; KPIs are re-baselined against SAMBA's own re-sourced weather/POA/load models.

battery_kwh.note: ±5 kWh absolute — ref=0 so relative is undefined
